name: @logosforge/whiteboard-shared-ui
description: LogosForge Whiteboard (Free) shared design layer — themes, tokens, the syntax palette, persistence + React theme glue, and the Claude Design stylesheet (styles/app.css). Platform-neutral; consumed by whiteboard-desktop (Electron) and whiteboard-web (browser). Single source of truth for the Whiteboard visual identity; never shares UI with the Pro line.
